topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Game Physics. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for AR/VR Developer roles.
whyItMatters: Game Physics is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Game Physics in a real-world scenario
Handling edge cases in Game Physics
practiceQuestions: Write a program demonstrating Game Physics.

interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Game Physics?
How does Game Physics handle memory management?
advancedProjects: Integrate Game Physics into a microservice
Scale Game Physics for 10k concurrent users
companyQuestions: How Amazon asks about Game Physics
